'''Shaala Doneeta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]] who was the personal [[Aide/Legends|aide]] of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

==Biography==
Doneeta was a personal [[Aide/Legends|aide]] of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] who wore [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-like [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] on her [[Lekku/Legends|lekku]]. She accompanied him when he made his [[Fete Day]] speech.

==Behind the scenes==
Shaala Doneeta was based on a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force Adept|adept]] originally created by [[Bryan K. Borgman]] for a Star Wars RPG home game in early [[2000]].<ref name="message board">{{WebCite|url=http://www.comicscommunity.com/boards/janduursema/?noframes;read=1188|text=Jan Duursema message board|archivedate=20071026121856}}</ref> The character was introduced into [[Star Wars Legends|canon]] via her appearance in the [[Shadowfeed/Legends|''CIS Shadowfeed'']] in [[Star Wars Insider 72|''Star Wars Insider'' 72]].
